title: Hackathon Winner
description: Won first place in a 48-hour hackathon focused on IoT solutions. Developed a smart home automation system using Arduino and React Native, demonstrating full-stack capabilities under time constraints.

extendedInfo.challenges: Managing time constraints while ensuring code quality and implementing robust error handling for IoT communication.

title: Ideathon Finalist
description: Reached the finals with an innovative healthcare app idea. Pitched a telemedicine platform connecting rural patients with specialists, showcasing both technical and business acumen.

extendedInfo.challenges: Designing an intuitive user experience for users with varying technical proficiency and ensuring HIPAA-compliant data handling.

title: Hackathon Participant
description: Participated in a competitive hackathon, building a real-time collaboration tool. Gained valuable experience in rapid prototyping, teamwork, and presenting technical solutions to judges.

extendedInfo.challenges: Implementing conflict resolution for simultaneous edits and maintaining real-time performance with multiple concurrent users.
